name: Functional - Valid Repository Processing End-to-End
description: Validates that the /process endpoint successfully processes a valid public GitHub repository URL and returns a structured report.
input: POST /process with SnykProcessRequest containing a valid public GitHub repo_url, and valid snyk_api_token (github_access_token=None).
output: SnykProcessResponse with success=True and a non-empty report.
success_criteria: response.report is not None and contains expected report sections
